_preset: LOW quality tier (rpg-uhhr). Target: Intel Iris/Xe, Steam Deck, older GCN/Maxwell. Overlays the engine defaults; only performance/quality keys are set so it composes with a level's look keys (sh_*, static_*, gi_vis_*). Select standalone via CLIENT_RENDER_CONFIG=assets/config/render_config.low.json, or merge before a level config once overlay-chaining lands. Values from ref/renderer_performance_issues_and_suggested_fixes.md section 7.3.
_note: Some keys (render_scale, shadow_fp16, gi_dyn_voxel, ...) only take full effect once their code ticket lands; until then they parse harmlessly and cost nothing.
